lessons.title: Healer Fundamentals
lessons.description: Learn the core principles of healing in FFXIV: prioritizing targets, understanding party-wide damage, and weaving oGCDs effectively.
keyPoints: Tank takes priority in most scenarios - they take the most consistent damage
Party-wide damage events require different healing than tank damage
oGCD heals should be weaved between GCDs to maintain DPS uptime
Never let oGCDs sit unused when healing is needed
tips: Watch the party list - anticipate damage before it happens
Practice weaving one oGCD between each GCD in a striking dummy

lessons.title: Emergency Response
lessons.description: Master WHM's emergency healing toolkit: when to use Benediction, Tetragrammaton, and how to react to critical situations.
keyPoints: Benediction is your panic button - full HP heal on 180s cooldown
Tetragrammaton is a strong oGCD heal (60s) - use it liberally
Emergency healing means someone will die without immediate intervention
Don't hold Benediction 'for emergencies' that never come
tips: If the tank is below 30% and taking heavy damage, that's an emergency
Tetragrammaton can handle most 'urgent' situations - save Benediction for true emergencies

lessons.title: The Lily System
lessons.description: Understand WHM's unique Lily gauge: generating lilies, spending them efficiently, and maximizing Blood Lily damage.
keyPoints: Lilies generate every 20s in combat (30s at lower levels)
Afflatus Solace: single-target lily heal - use for tank healing
Afflatus Rapture: AoE lily heal - use for party-wide damage
Each lily spent builds toward Blood Lily (Afflatus Misery)
Afflatus Misery is your strongest single attack - don't waste it
tips: Lilies are 'free' heals - they don't cost MP and refund GCD time via Misery
Always try to use 3 lilies before downtime to get Misery ready
Don't overcap lilies (max 3) - use them or lose them

lessons.title: Proactive Healing
lessons.description: Learn to heal before damage happens: maintaining Regen, timing shields, and using Assize and Divine Benison effectively.
keyPoints: Proactive healing prevents emergencies before they happen
Keep Regen on the tank at all times during combat
Divine Benison provides a shield - apply before damage, not after
Assize heals AND damages - use it on cooldown for DPS when healing is adequate
Shields applied after damage are wasted shields
tips: Put Regen on the tank before the pull, not during
Assize has a short cooldown (40s) - don't hold it for 'big heals'

lessons.title: Defensive Cooldowns
lessons.description: Master WHM's defensive toolkit: Temperance for party mitigation, Aquaveil for tank protection, and Liturgy of the Bell for heavy damage.
keyPoints: Temperance: 10% party mitigation + healing boost for 20s (2min CD)
Aquaveil: 15% mitigation on one target for 8s (1min CD) - great for tankbusters
Liturgy of the Bell: place it, party takes damage, bell heals them
Use Temperance proactively before heavy party damage phases
tips: Liturgy requires 5 'rings' of damage to maximize healing - plan around mechanics
Aquaveil on the tank before a tankbuster is often better than healing after

lessons.title: DPS Optimization
lessons.description: Maximize your damage contribution: prioritizing Glare, maintaining Dia (DoT), and balancing DPS with healing.
keyPoints: Glare is your filler - cast it whenever you're not healing
Dia (DoT) should be maintained on the boss at all times
DoT refresh at 3s or less remaining to avoid clipping
Good healers do damage while keeping the party alive
Dead DPS do 0 damage - healing enables party DPS
tips: In dungeons, Holy's stun is a mitigation tool - use it early in pulls
Aim for 80%+ GCD uptime on Glare in boss fights

lessons.title: Utility & Coordination
lessons.description: Final lesson: Esuna usage, raise prioritization, and coordinating with your co-healer for optimal party performance.
keyPoints: Esuna removes debuffs with a white bar above them
Raise has a long cast time - Swiftcast + Raise is standard
Communicate with your co-healer to avoid duplicate raises
Don't both healers use party mitigation at the same time
Coordinate who handles tank healing vs party healing
tips: In progression, calling raises in voice chat prevents wasted MP
Some debuffs are not cleansable even with a white bar - learn which ones
